headline: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) Could Be 12% Undervalued As Dividend News Lands
summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) shares are in focus after the company declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share, payable on September 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on August 18. At a last close of $263.89, Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies has seen a 1-day share price return of 1.61% and a year to date share price return of 22.01%.
